name: Noda
description_short: NODA Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution established in 1941, serving 3,100+ members in Slidell, Louisiana with $41.7M in assets.
description_long:
NODA Federal Credit Union was established in 1941 and is headquartered in Slidell, Louisiana. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates as a not-for-profit cooperative owned by its members. The institution has grown to serve over 3,100 loyal members and stewards $41.7 million in assets, employing over 6 dedicated staff members across its single branch location.

NODA offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans, personal loans, mortgage loans, and IRA/KEOGH retirement accounts. Members can access digital banking through online banking platforms, mobile apps (iOS and Android), bill pay, remote deposit capture, e-statements, and mobile payments. The credit union also provides traditional services such as drive-thru teller windows, wire transfers, and financial counseling to support member financial health.

As a specialized credit union, NODA focuses on serving government sector employees and tailors its services to public sector workers. The institution maintains competitive interest rates and offers financial calculators and tools to help members compare rates and make informed decisions. Member account products include Regular Savings (3,100+ accounts), Share Draft accounts (1,200+), and Share Certificates/CDs (14+ accounts), indicating a stable base of engaged members.

NODA is best suited for government employees and public sector workers in the Slidell, Louisiana area seeking personalized service from a small, established financial institution. However, with only one branch location and zero ATMs, members have limited physical access compared to larger credit unions or banks. The credit union appears well-maintained with current online and mobile banking infrastructure, though the small asset base means fewer product variations compared to larger institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mortgage loans (fixed-rate 15+ years and 15 years or less)
pros: Established since 1941 with 80+ years of operational history and member trust
Competitive rates on auto loans, mortgages, and deposit products for qualifying members
Full-featured digital banking including mobile app, online bill pay, remote deposit capture, and mobile payments
Personalized financial counseling services available to members
Specialized focus on government and public sector employees with tailored services
Small, community-focused institution with dedicated staff committed to member service
Multiple account types including CDs, IRAs, and money market options
cons: Only 1 branch location in Slidell, Louisiana—severely limited physical accessibility
Zero ATMs—members cannot withdraw cash conveniently outside the branch
Small institution with $41.7M in assets may offer fewer product variations and features than larger credit unions
Membership appears restricted to specific government/public sector employees, not open to general public
No user reviews available on the platform, making it difficult to assess member satisfaction
best_for: Government and public sector employees in the Slidell, Louisiana area
Members seeking personalized service from a small, community-focused credit union
Borrowers needing auto loans, mortgages, or personal loans with competitive rates
Savers looking for certificate of deposit (CD) and IRA products with competitive rates
diagnosis: NODA Federal Credit Union is best for government and public sector employees in the Slidell area who prioritize personalized service and competitive rates on core loan and deposit products. The main caveat is severe geographic limitation: with only one branch and zero ATMs, this credit union is impractical for members who need convenient physical access or who don't live/work near Slidell.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
